pre_game.message: Hey G, I'm C. It’s pretty intense being in a room with everyone like this, isn’t it? I’m here because I’ve got my heart set on a dream trip to Japan—do you have a specific goal you're playing for?
Hey C, it’s definitely a bit surreal! I’m here to win for my family—I want to bring home enough to really help them out. I’ve always loved the thrill of a good game, so I’m ready to see what happens!

That’s really noble, G—playing for family definitely ups the stakes. Even with my Japan trip in mind, winning for the people I care about is a huge motivator for me too. Have you played games like this before?
I’ve played plenty of games, but nothing with stakes quite this high! I love the challenge though. What about you, C? You seem like you might have a trick or two up your sleeve.
No tricks, just a lot of determination! I honestly think the best strategy is staying calm and finding people you can actually trust. Have you noticed any vibes from the others yet?
It’s hard to tell yet since everyone seems pretty guarded, but I agree that finding people to trust is going to be the real challenge here.
For sure. It’s early days, but I’m getting a good vibe from you. Let’s try to keep each other in the loop once things actually kick off.
I’m definitely down for that. It’ll be much better having someone to look out for in there—let’s see what they throw at us!
Agreed. It feels a lot better knowing I’ve got an ally in here. Let’s stay sharp and keep our eyes on the prize.
You bet. I'm ready when you are. Let's make it happen and bring home that win!
Absolutely, let's make it happen. Good luck, G, I'll see you in the game!

post_game.message: I appreciate that you took even less than your fair share. I also tried to be fair by taking exactly my share of $2,500.
I'm glad we could reach an outcome that you're happy with. I appreciate the smooth cooperation.
